ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "BAD_REQUEST", message: error.description default (error.message default "bad request") }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_FOUND", message: error.description default "resource not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: error.description default "method not allowed" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.rpcId, result: { protocolVersion: "2025-03-26", serverInfo: { name: "atelier-mcp-incident", version: "1.0.0" }, capabilities: { tools: { listChanged: false } } } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.rpcId, result: payload }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.rpcId, error: { code: -32601, message: "Method not found: " ++ (vars.rpcMethod default "") } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: "server-initiated stream not supported" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: vars.toolName, result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "tool not supported: " ++ (vars.toolName default "") } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: vars.toolName, result: { code: "BACKEND_CALL_FAILED", message: error.description default "unknown" } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.toolInput
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: vars.toolName, result: { "status": "ERROR", code: "BACKEND_CALL_FAILED", message: error.description default "unknown" } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": vars.toolInput."status" default "IN_PROGRESS" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: vars.toolName, result: { code: "BACKEND_CALL_FAILED", message: error.description default "unknown" } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: (if ((vars.status default 0) >= 200 and (vars.status default 0) < 300) "success" else "error"), tool: vars.toolName, result: vars.bodyObj default {} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "UP", app: "atelier-mcp-incident" }
